summary: Test-only + rename cleanup across two languages; zero production behavior change for F2/F3/F5 (test-only), F6 is a mechanical parameter rename with call-site updates.

files.change: Add 2 new tests: non-ASCII byte-offset fixture (F2) and substring-marker near-miss regression (F3).
files.risk: none — additive only, no existing test modified

files.change: Change 3 PutEdge weights in PutEdge_WeightIncrement_ViaCompact from 1,1,1 to 3,4,5 and update the expected total from 3 to 12.
files.risk: low — test-only, but must verify graph.Compact / mergeEdges actually sums (not caps/counts) or the strengthened assertion could newly fail

files.change: Rename weight_delta -> occurrence_weight: SegmentWiringClient Protocol method, GrpcEntityEdgeClient.put_edge, GrpcSegmentWiringClient.put_edge, and the two execute_segment call sites plus one docstring reference.
files.risk: medium blast radius (5 definition/call sites in this file) but purely mechanical - keyword-only param, no positional callers exist
files.blast_radius: all put_edge signatures/call sites in wiring.py

files.change: Rename weight_delta -> occurrence_weight in the fake client's put_edge signature (must match Protocol).
files.risk: none if done in lockstep with wiring.py

files.change: Rename weight_delta -> occurrence_weight in fake client signature/body and all call sites (5 occurrences).

cross_cutting_concerns: F6 rename must be applied atomically across production + all test doubles in the same commit, or pytest will fail on keyword-arg mismatch (Protocol is structural/duck-typed in Python, but the fakes call the keyword explicitly).

F5's new weights (3,4,5) must be distinct pairwise and the expected sum (12) must be produced only by true summation, not e.g. max() (5) or count*avg tricks - 12 is unreachable by any single input weight or by count alone (count=3), so it uniquely discriminates sum from count/max/last-write-wins.
no_production_behavior_change: F2, F3 are additive tests only. F5 is test-only. F6 is a pure rename (no logic change) - grep-verified no other file outside agents/ingestion references weight_delta.
